title: Resilient File Storage System
constraints: Must use AWS S3 for file storage.
Must implement validation for file size, content type, and other constraints.
Must handle errors and exceptions, including file upload failures, duplicate file uploads, and incorrect file types.
Must implement proper authentication using JSON Web Tokens (JWT).
Must implement rate limiting to prevent abuse.
Must use a caching layer to improve performance.

endpoints.description: Upload a file to S3, validate file size and content type, and return the uploaded file's metadata.
Retrieve a list of uploaded files, including their metadata and URLs.
